zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Casse於大約1550年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾可洛普維爾 畢曉普時，她的父親John Casse21歲，母親Jennett Alcorne19歲。她於1568年8月28日與John de Rossell在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾可洛普維爾 畢曉普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1650年之前在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Casse于大约1550年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾可洛普維爾 畢曉普时，她的父亲John Casse21岁，母亲Jennett Alcorne19岁。她于1568年8月28日与John de Rossell在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾可洛普維爾 畢曉普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1650年之前在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克倫威爾。

nameMeanings.name: Casse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (also Cassé): topographic name denoting someone who lived by an oak tree, Old French casse (from Gaulish cassanos); or a habitational name from Casse, the name of several places mainly in the southwestern part of France, or Cassé, a place in Sarthe. Compare Ducasse and Lacasse .
from Old French casse ‘saucepan, pan’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of pans.

variants.name: Ducasse
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Baptiste, Jean Daniel, Veronique.  Spanish Carlos Alberto, Herminia, Jose, Juan, Luis, Rafael.

French: topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone who lived by an oak tree, Old French casse (see Casse 1), or a habitational name for someone from Le Casse, the name of several places mainly in the southwestern part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Casse was born about 1550, in Cropwell Bishop, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Casse, was 21 and her mother, Jennett Alcorne, was 19. She married John de Rossell on 28 August 1568, in Cropwell Bishop, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 1650, in Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Casse est née environ 1550, à Cropwell Bishop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Casse, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jennett Alcorne, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John de Rossell le 28 août 1568, à Cropwell Bishop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1650, à Cromwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Casseが約1550年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロプウエル ビショップで生まれた時，父John Casseは21歳，母Jennett Alcorneは19歳であった。1568年8月28日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロプウエル ビショップでJohn de Rossellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1650年以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクロムウエルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Casse(이)가 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 크럽웰 비숍에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Casse(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jennett Alcorne(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1568년 8월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 크럽웰 비숍에서 John de Rossell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1650년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 크롬웰에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Casse родилась около 1550 г. в местности кропвелл бишоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Casse было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jennett Alcorne, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Rossell 28 августа 1568 г. в местности кропвелл бишоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 1650 г. в местности кромвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
